overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto: Vice City showing protagonist Tommy Vercetti walking along Vice Beach. The clip features a bright tropical beach environment with scattered NPCs, modern beachfront hotels lining the right side, and a helicopter passing overhead in the latter half.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach with distant beachfront hotels

agents.ego_description: Tommy Vercetti walking steadily along the beach toward the distant buildings on the right

notable_agents.action: male NPC in orange outfit walking behind and to the left of the protagonist

entered.detail: expansive sandy beach terrain stretching to the horizon
tall modern hotel building with glass facade lining the beachfront
palm trees clustered near the hotel buildings
scattered pedestrians walking and standing on the beach in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunny beach with the protagonist walking forward. The camera follows from behind showing expansive sandy terrain with modern beachfront hotels visible on the right horizon and palm trees scattered nearby. An NPC in an orange outfit walks behind the protagonist on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with prominent oceanfront buildings on the right

events.description: helicopter appears flying overhead in the sky

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the beach, moving closer to the beachfront hotels on the right side

notable_agents.action: NPC in orange outfit continues walking behind the protagonist, gradually falling back

entered.detail: small dark helicopter flying high in the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The protagonist continues walking along the beach as the camera approaches closer to the beachfront hotels now dominating the right side of the frame. A helicopter flies overhead appearing in the sky around the 20-second mark, while the NPC in orange continues walking behind on the left. The sandy beach stretches ahead with distant pedestrians visible near the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a bright tropical beach that gradually shifts from an expansive sandy vista to a closer view of a beachfront skyline. It begins by following the protagonist from behind across wide stretches of sand, with scattered palm trees and modern hotels visible on the distant right horizon. As the protagonist advances, the camera draws closer to the towering beachfront hotels that begin to dominate the right side of the frame, while an NPC in an orange outfit trails behind on the left. The scene then expands upward as a helicopter flies overhead across the clear sky, before the camera continues forward toward distant pedestrians lingering near the horizon.
